name: Lasa Supergenerics Limited
summary: Lasa Supergenerics Limited engages in the research, manufacture, and marketing of animal and human healthcare products primarily in India. It offers veterinary and other API products, anthelmintic products, animal feed ingredients, and reagents for therapeutic use. The company also exports its products. Lasa Supergenerics Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Mumbai, India.
